name: L.A. Auto Sales
description_short: L.A. Autos is a car dealership in Omaha, NE that provides in-house auto financing with flexible approval standards for buyers with poor or challenged credit.
description_long:
L.A. Autos operates as a used car dealership located at 7700 L St in Omaha, Nebraska. Founded to serve customers throughout the Omaha area, the company positions itself as a direct lender rather than a referral service, meaning it finances vehicle purchases directly through its own financial operations rather than brokering loans through third parties.

The company offers a three-step financing process: pre-approval through a quick online credit application, vehicle selection from their inventory, and same-day test drives and vehicle pickup. Their inventory includes vehicles priced from approximately $4,995 to $19,995, featuring popular makes including Ford, Chevrolet, Dodge, Toyota, Jeep, and Subaru. The dealership emphasizes quick approval timelines, claiming applications can be processed within minutes and customers can often drive home the same day of application. They accept trade-ins and advertise competitive values for trade-in vehicles.

L.A. Autos distinguishes itself by explicitly targeting consumers with poor credit histories. Their marketing emphasizes "flexibility and solutions for every type of credit no matter how bad" and claims to work with applicants throughout the approval process to ensure financing. The company positions itself as acting directly as the bank rather than serving as a middleman, which they argue provides greater flexibility in underwriting decisions compared to traditional lenders.

While the dealership offers accessible financing for credit-challenged buyers, potential customers should note that the company is primarily a used car dealer focused on vehicle sales and finance, not a dedicated personal finance lender. The vehicles in inventory show higher mileage typical of used car markets (ranging from 62,703 to 238,660 miles), and pricing reflects used vehicle valuations rather than new car deals. No specific APR rates, loan terms, or financing parameters are disclosed on the website.
pros: Direct lender model eliminates middleman and provides greater flexibility in approval decisions for poor credit applicants
Pre-approval process takes only minutes with potential approval within minutes of submission
Same-day vehicle pickup available for approved applicants
In-house financing means no external referrals or broker involvement
Explicit willingness to work with applicants with bad credit throughout the approval process
Trade-in program available to help offset vehicle purchase costs
Wide inventory of popular vehicle makes and price points from $4,995-$19,995
cons: No specific APR rates, loan terms, or financing conditions disclosed on website—making true cost comparison impossible
Vehicles carry high mileage (62K-238K miles) typical of used car markets with associated wear and reliability risks
No information about interest rate ranges, down payment requirements, or loan duration options
As a used car dealership, this is not specialized consumer finance—primary business model is vehicle sales
Marketing heavily emphasizes approval for poor credit, which may indicate higher-risk lending practices or elevated APRs
best_for: Used car buyers with poor or challenged credit histories who need vehicle financing
Omaha-area consumers seeking same-day vehicle purchase and financing approval
Buyers with existing trade-in vehicles looking to finance a replacement car
Consumers prioritizing direct lender relationships over third-party loan brokers
diagnosis: L.A. Autos is best for Omaha-area consumers with poor credit who need used vehicle financing with same-day approval and pickup. Primary caveat: this is a used car dealership, not a consumer finance specialist—no APR rates or loan terms are disclosed, making it impossible to assess true cost before contacting the dealer directly.
services: Online credit application and pre-approval for auto financing
Direct in-house auto loan origination and funding
Used vehicle inventory browsing and selection
Financing for applicants with poor, bad, or no credit history
Multi-make vehicle inventory (Ford, Chevrolet, Dodge, Toyota, Jeep, Subaru, Nissan, GMC, RAM, Lexus, Lincoln, Acura, Chrysler)
